title: UltraTech Cement is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: UltraTech Cement is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
